items.title: Parliament Monsoon Session Day 4 LIVE: Oppn. MPs move adjournment motions as deadlock continues over discussion on NEET paper 'leak'
items.summary: Both Houses of Parliament have failed to transact any business for the first three days of the Monsoon Session, which commenced on July 20

items.title: Saudi Arabia and US agree to landmark nuclear deal for civilian purposes
items.summary: The US and Saudi Arabia have agreed to a civilian nuclear deal allowing Riyadh to build nuclear reactors.
